title: Run cargo fmt --all to fix CI-red formatting drift; add fmt check to recorded verify
action: Run `cargo fmt --all` at the repo root to apply rustfmt's canonical formatting (no logic change, mechanical only). Then edit .bee/config.json's commands.verify to append ` && cargo fmt --all --check` right after `cargo test --quiet` (before clippy), so future cells catch formatting drift locally instead of only in CI.

truths: cargo fmt --all --check exits 0 (clean) after the fix
cargo test and cargo clippy -D warnings still pass
prohibitions: Do not change any test assertion logic, only its formatting
Do not touch any file cargo fmt does not itself reformat

verify: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: ran cargo fmt --all to fix CI formatting drift; added cargo fmt --all --check to recorded verify
trace.verify_output: cargo fmt --all --check: clean (exit 0). cargo test --quiet: 152 passed, 2 passed, 3 passed, 0 failed across all suites. cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings: clean, no warnings, exit 0.
trace.verify_command: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
